# meok-allmi-hiab-mcp

> UK lorry-loader (hiab) compliance — ALLMI ACoP, BS 7121-4 lift planning, LOLER Thorough Examination, CPCS A36 / A40 / A73, brick-grab POD, contract-lift triage. For builders' merchants + specialist hiab operators. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- generate_hiab_lift_plan
- triage_contract_lift_threshold
- check_allmi_thorough_examination
- check_cpcs_a36
- check_slinger_a40_a73
- capture_brick_grab_pod
- flag_delivery_rejection_risk
- audit_pre_delivery_walkaround

## Install
```
pip install meok-allmi-hiab-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-allmi-hiab-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
